log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Water Genasi — Iron Concentration --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:16+4=20 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Water Genasi — Iron Concentration (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Water Genasi — Iron Concentration
→ Bite: [d20:6+10=16 vs AC 14] HIT! 13 damage. Water Genasi — Iron Concentration HP: 54/67
→ Bite: [d20:12+10=22 vs AC 14] HIT! 11 damage. Water Genasi — Iron Concentration HP: 43/67
→ Bite: [d20:5+10=15 vs AC 14] HIT! 22 damage. Water Genasi — Iron Concentration HP: 21/67
══ ROUND 2 ══
--- Water Genasi — Iron Concentration --- HP: 21/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: No concentration. Hold Person on Young Red Dragon (paralyzed = auto-crit in melee).
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:15+4=19 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. No effect.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Water Genasi — Iron Concentration (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Water Genasi — Iron Concentration
→ Bite: [d20:16+10=26 vs AC 14] HIT! 18 damage. Water Genasi — Iron Concentration HP: 3/67
→ Bite: [d20:6+10=16 vs AC 14] HIT! 15 damage. Water Genasi — Iron Concentration HP: -12/67
══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Water Genasi — Iron Concentration --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:7+4=11 vs DC 15] FAIL!
→ 1/1 targets affected.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18 | Cond: [charmed_hp, incapacitated]
** INCAPACITATED ** Cannot take actions.
══ ROUND 2 ══
--- Water Genasi — Iron Concentration --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 14 | Conc: Hypnotic Pattern
REASONING: All 1 enemies disabled by Hypnotic Pattern. Dodging to maintain concentration.
ACTION: Dodge. Attacks against have disadvantage.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18 | Cond: [charmed_hp, incapacitated]
